calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Against Taking The Deposition Of Kathy Peng, Aka Yimei Peng
Off Calendar Apr-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Richard G. Hyppa (209) 836-9288, appearing through Court Call for Plaintiff in Pro Per.
William F. Abbott, Esquire (415)788-8810 appearing for Defendant Calvin Cheung.
Tony C. Hoh (415)788-8810 appearing for Defendant Adam Yeh
Mabel Yee of Hoa T. Cooc (415) 309-5095 appearing for Non-Party Kathy Peng.

The parties stipulate to the matter being decided by Judge Pro Tem James Watson. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT ADAM YEH'S Motion For Protective Order Against Taking The Deposition Of Kathy Peng, Aka Yimei Peng. Is DENIED without Prejudice. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: James Watson, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
